Category: Hospitality & Tourism: Hotels, Tourism, Travel Agencies, Food & Beverage
Who is this for: Restaurant managers, hotel food service staff, catering coordinators, hospitality supervisors, food and beverage directors, kitchen managers, front-of-house staff, tourism operators, travel agency staff
Team or Dept this is for: Food & Beverage, Hospitality Operations, Restaurant Management, Catering, Hotel Operations, Customer Service, Tourism Services
Description: Risks related to dietary restrictions and allergens.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with food service or hospitality operations, along with a general awareness of common dietary requirements such as allergies and intolerances, is all that is needed to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key risks associated with AI-generated menus and food recommendations, particularly in relation to dietary restrictions and allergens. You will also be able to apply practical strategies to verify and communicate allergen information accurately, ensuring the safety and wellbeing of guests across hospitality and food service settings.
